title: Pouvoirs de signature
text_preview: I, PAUL MARTIN, Secretary of State for External Affairs in the Government of Canada, do hereby certify that R. CAMPBELL SMITH, Minister Counsellor Canadian Embassy, Paris, France, is vested with Full Power and Authority to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, "sans réserve de ratification", the Protocol modifying Article IV of the Convention relating to International Exhibitions, 1928, as amended May 10, 194…

pages.text:
I, PAUL MARTIN,

Secretary of State for External Affairs in the Government of Canada, do hereby certify that

R. CAMPBELL SMITH,

Minister Counsellor

Canadian Embassy,

Paris, France, is vested with Full Power and Authority to sign, on behalf of the Government of Canada, "sans réserve de ratification", the Protocol modifying Article IV of the Convention relating to International Exhibitions, 1928, as amended

May 10, 1948, which was drafted at a meeting of the Council of the International Bureau for

Exhibitions held in Paris on November 17, 1965.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF I have signed and sealed these presents at ottawa this /4th day of June, 1966.

Pad Manue

Secretary of State for External Affairs.
